justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'this Saturday' as May 30th and accurately found available slots around 9 AM as requested by the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully identified and offered two relevant time slots that fit the user's initial request, leading to a quick resolution.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was very efficient, with the agent gathering all necessary information and booking the appointment in just two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and confirming the booking without any issues.
